title: Union Pacific says two routes into Los Angeles Basin closed due to flooding
text: Union Pacific Corp said on Monday that two routes into and out of the Los Angeles Basin were closed due to washouts and flood water over the rail, after parts of Southern California and the U.S. Southwest were hit by flash floods.

title: Transport ETFs in Focus Post Q2 Earnings
text: The second-quarter earnings picture for the transportation sector has also been solid. For a better understanding, let's delve into the results of some well-known industry players.
